creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Please, only use send-pr for bona fide problems.  The answer 
to your question can be found on the FreeBSD web site, which 
is searchable at http://www.FreeBSD.org/search/.  The answer 
is available through the mailing list archive file at: 
http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=6643824+0+/usr/local/www/db/text/2000/freebsd-questions/20000220.freebsd-questions
